concerns.text: FR-001 (OpenNeuro Navigation) is stated in research.md but not explicitly addressed in plan.md. The plan mentions downloading datasets but doesn't specifically link this to FR-001.

SC-005 (Power/Sample) is mentioned in research.md, but the plan doesn't explicitly state how the system will flag power limitations if <100 epochs are obtained. While the research.md states 'flag power limitation', the plan doesn't reflect this.
The 'Complexity Tracking' table is present in the plan but contains no violations. This seems unnecessary and could be removed, or populated with actual complexity considerations if any exist.
